habitat: SE Asia; essential in Thai and Indonesian cooking.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary aromatic rhizome; traditional digestive and cold-related uses in SE Asian folk medicine.
traditionalUsesDe: Kulinarisches Aromarhizom; traditionell bei Verdauung und Erkältung in SE-Asien.
preparation: Fresh slices in soups and curries; dried powder; teas.
cautions: Culinary amounts generally safe. Medicinal concentrates—professional guidance.
historicalNotes: Distinct from lesser galangal (Alpinia officinarum) used more in Chinese medicine.
habitatDe: SE Asien; essential in Thai und Indonesian die Küche.
preparationDe: Frisch slices in soups und curries; getrocknet powder; teas.
cautionsDe: Kulinarisch amounts im Allgemeinen unbedenklich. Medicinal concentrates—fachlicher Anleitung.
historicalNotesDe: Distinct von lesser galangal (Alpinia officinarum) used more in Chinese medicine.
